channel.title: Jameskilbycouk
channel.description: VMware and cloud infrastructure tutorials, homelab guides, and DevOps insights

item.title: My Self-Hosted AI Stack: Infrastructure Deep Dive (Part 2)
item.description: Part 2 of my self-hosted AI stack series. I cover container resource sizing, dual-network isolation via Traefik and Cloudflare Tunnels, and every database po...
item.author: James

item.title: Automating vSphere Power Management driven by Ansible and SemaphoreUI
item.description: Two vSphere power management Ansible playbooks to toggle ESXi hosts between Low Power and Balanced policies, driven by Semaphore variables.
item.author: James

item.title: New VMC Host i7i.metal-24xl
item.description: We’ve expanded the VMC fleet with the new i7i (i7i.24xlarge) host type. Powered by Intel Emerald Rapids processors with PCIe Gen5 connectivity, it delivers
item.author: James

item.title: Automated VCF 9 Offline Depot
item.description: Automated VCF 9 Offline Depot: one Bash script gives you Traefik, Nginx, basic auth, and Let's Encrypt wildcard certs via Cloudflare DNS.
item.author: James

item.title: Free Octopus Agile Battery & Solar Calculator: 5 Batteries Tested
item.description: A free Octopus Agile battery calculator using your real usage data to show if a home battery or solar is worth the investment. Tests 5 UK batteries.
item.author: James

item.title: My Self-Hosted AI Stack: Architecture Overview (Part 1)
item.description: Build a fully private AI stack on your own hardware with Ollama, Open WebUI, n8n, ComfyUI, Qdrant & SearxNG on Docker Compose. Full technical deep dive with ...
item.author: James

item.title: Automating the deployment of my Homelab AI Infrastructure
item.description: In a previous post, I wrote about using my VMware lab with an NVIDIA Tesla P4 for running some AI services. This deployment was done with the P4 GPU in passt...
item.author: James

item.title: Blog Performance & SEO Improvements: Cloudflare, Privacy & More
item.description: A roundup of performance, SEO, privacy, and security improvements made to this WordPress blog over the Christmas break, including backend optimisations and b...
item.author: James

item.title: Using Content Libraries in VMC to deploy software faster
item.description: Learn how to use VMware Content Libraries in VMware Cloud on AWS (VMC) to speed up template and VM deployments, reducing manual steps and improving consistency.
item.author: James

item.title: vSAN Cluster Shutdown – Orchestration
item.description: Step-by-step guide to safely shutting down a vSAN cluster: the correct orchestration order for powering off VMs, hosts, and witness appliances without data l...
item.author: James

item.title: VMware Cloud on AWS Time Sync & NTP Configuration
item.description: How VMware Cloud on AWS handles time sync NTP via the Amazon Time Sync Service. Configure NSX firewall rules for UDP port 123 on VMC guest workloads.
item.author: James

item.title: How to Expand Ubuntu Disk Space: LVM pvresize Step-by-Step
item.description: Step-by-step guide to expanding disk space in Ubuntu using growpart, pvresize, and lvextend for LVM volumes — commands I always forget and keep here for refe...
item.author: James

item.title: How I upgraded my blog as a Static Website with GitHub Actions and Cloudflare
item.description: Learn how to automate your blog with GitHub Actions and Cloudflare for seamless publishing. Check out my steps to improve your setup today!
item.author: James

item.title: Managing my Homelab with SemaphoreUI
item.description: Learn to manage your homelab using SemaphoreUI with Docker. Follow our guide to streamline your DevOps tools like Ansible and Terraform today!
item.author: James

item.title: An in-depth look at VMware Cloud on AWS hosts
item.description: Dive into the detailed features of VMware Cloud on AWS hosts. Compare and analyze all available data for informed decisions.
item.author: James

item.title: VMware Cloud on AWS Storage Sizing Quick Reference Guide
item.description: Get essential insights on storage resources in VMware Cloud on AWS. Use our quick sizing guide for efficient planning and management.
item.author: James

item.title: Warp – The intelligent terminal
item.description: How Warp is helping me run my homelab. Unlock the potential of your terminal and streamline your Linux tools with Warp's intelligent features.
item.author: James

item.title: How I Migrated from Pocket to Hoarder with AI Integration
item.description: How I migrated to Hoarder for my Bookmark Management Update: Hoarder has now been renamed to Karakeep due to a trademark issue
item.author: James

item.title: How to Run ZFS on VMware vSphere: Setup Guide and Best Practices
item.description: ZFS,VMware,Best Practices for seamless integration and performance. Learn how to optimize your setup for maximum efficiency and reliability.
item.author: James

item.title: Self Hosting AI Stack using vSphere, Docker and NVIDIA GPU
item.description: Self Hosting AI Stack using vSphere, Docker and NVIDIA GPU, Self Hosted solutions for AI enthusiasts. Start your AI journey today!
item.author: James
